title: rhododendron pronum
intro: Rhododendron pronum, a type of flowering shrub native to the Himalayas, is also known as rhododendron or rhododendron leaf. Traditionally, the leaves of this plant have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron pronum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat digestive issues. Rhododendron pronum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
